ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the employee works */,
  "cost_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cost center the employee belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role or job title of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact details of the employee */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Status of the employee (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_cost_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_center_id") REFERENCES cost_centers ("cost_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_centers" (
  "cost_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost center */,
  "cost_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the cost center */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the cost center belongs */,
  "cost_center_code" TEXT /* Code of the cost center */,
  "cost_center_description" TEXT /* Description of the cost center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_centers_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation" (
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compensation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the compensation record */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the compensation record */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the compensation record */,
  "base_salary" REAL /* Base salary for the employee */,
  "benefits" REAL /* Benefits provided to the employee */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus received by the employee */,
  "variable_pay" REAL /* Variable pay for the employee */,
  "stock_options" REAL /* Stock options provided to the employee */,
  "compensation_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the compensation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compensation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compensation_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overtime" (
  "overtime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overtime record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the overtime record */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the overtime record */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the overtime record */,
  "overtime_hours" INTEGER /* Number of overtime hours worked by the employee */,
  "average_cost_hour" REAL /* Average cost per hour of overtime */,
  "overtime_cost" REAL /* Total cost of overtime for the employee */,
  "overtime_type" TEXT /* Type of overtime (voluntary/mandatory) */,
  "overtime_approved" TEXT /* Overtime approval status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("overtime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overtime_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the role belongs */,
  "minimum_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary for the role */,
  "maximum_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary for the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_category" TEXT /* Category of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the department */,
  "department_code" TEXT /* Code of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the manager works */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the time period */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the time period */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the time period */,
  "time_period_type" TEXT /* Type of time period (monthly/quarterly/annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compensation trend record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average base salary for the region */,
  "average_bonus" REAL /* Average bonus for the region */,
  "average_benefits" REAL /* Average benefits for the region */,
  "average_variable_pay" REAL /* Average variable pay for the region */,
  "average_stock_options" REAL /* Average stock options for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compensation_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance requirement */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "requirement" TEXT /* Description of the compliance requirement */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance requirement becomes effective */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance requirement */,
  "compliance_description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Type of permission granted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (view/edit/delete) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
